name: LookupEventProvider
title: LookupEventProvider
description: Searches for the specified event provider. The path must be complete including namespaces, endpoint and event: (Namespace::)+Service[provider].Event.
You can downcast the result to a concrete type, see the example.
return: The event provider. An uninitialized object if the event provider is not found, which will also be reported in the Write Window or as an error in test system (if the function is called in a test routine).
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
